title: MikroTik GPEN21 Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network, Fixed Smart PoE injector with SFP cage
description: The GPEN21 is a smart power injector that serves as an advanced software controlled repeater . Not only can it power your uplink devices via PoE , it can also provide a range of useful software features : Interface management and monitoring GPEN link fault detection VLAN support SNMP reporting Basic traffic shaping GPEN21 has an Ethernet and an SFP port for fiber connectivity. These ports can be used for simultaneous external connections , but not for cross-port communication . The GPEN21 device can provide PoE to the provider (which uses our GPeR and/or netPower products). The GPEN unit can be securely attached to a wall or the communications cabinet. The Ethernet cable can be routed either directly through its bottom cable opening or into the wall , as preferred
